# Sujeet Jaiswal — Engineering Notes (full index)

> Personal blog and portfolio of Sujeet Jaiswal, a Principal Software Engineer
> writing deep technical guides on frontend architecture, web performance,
> distributed systems, and system design.

This document enumerates the top-level content surfaces on sujeet.pro
so AI assistants can locate relevant material without crawling. Individual
article bodies are available at the corresponding HTML URLs or in the Pagefind
index at `/pagefind/`.

Source of truth lives in `content/articles/*/README.md` and
`content/blogs/*/README.md` in the sujeet-pro/sujeet.pro GitHub repository.

## Top-level routes

- /             — Home, featured articles, series overview.
- /articles     — Article index, grouped by series.
- /blogs        — Blog index, reverse-chronological.
- /articles/<slug> — Individual article (see content/articles/).
- /blogs/<slug>    — Individual blog post (see content/blogs/).
- /404.html     — Not-found fallback.
- /sitemap.xml  — Machine-readable sitemap.

## Article series (190+ articles across 22 topics)

- Critical Rendering Path: DOM construction, CSSOM, layout, painting,
  compositing, and browser paint flow.
- JavaScript Runtime Internals: V8 engine tiers, hidden classes, inline
  caches, optimizing compilers, event loops, garbage collection.
- System Design Scenarios: Ride hailing, social platforms, search, streaming,
  crawlers, photo-sharing, and end-to-end architecture trade-offs.
- Web Performance: Measurement, Core Web Vitals, image/font optimization,
  critical-rendering-path tuning, CDN/edge strategies.
- Consistency Models & CAP: Linearizability, causal consistency, eventual
  consistency, PACELC, and per-operation guarantees.
- Frontend Architecture at Scale: Domain boundaries, contract-first
  integration, release models, governance.
- Networking & APIs: HTTP/3, QUIC, fetch/streaming, service workers,
  caching and compression.

## Content authoring conventions

- Each article lives at `content/articles/<slug>/README.md` with a Zod-validated
  frontmatter block describing title, description, series, tags, etc.
- Blog posts follow the same pattern under `content/blogs/<slug>/README.md`.
- `meta.json5` files under `content/` control grouping and manual ordering.
- `redirects.json5` at the content root declares HTML-level redirects.

## Maintenance

- Maintainer: Sujeet Jaiswal, https://sujeet.pro.
- Repository: https://github.com/sujeet-pro/sujeet.pro.
- Build system: Vite + `@pagesmith/core` + `@pagesmith/site` (no `@pagesmith/docs`).
- Diagrams are rendered via diagramkit (see `content/**/.diagramkit/`).
